# Plan: Regex Conformance

## Overview

A single Pending non-delegate phase whose AC block already contains both
plain-numbered and sub-letter canonical ACs (`AC-1.6c`). Used to verify
that the spec format regex (AC-3.2) admits one-line and multi-line
expansions, including sub-letter AC IDs.
